title: [Sentry] panic: runtime error: index out of range [5] with length 3
description:
## panic: runtime error: index out of range

**Sentry Issue:** https://sentry.io/organizations/myorg/issues/9876543/

**Culprit:** payments/processor.go in processPayment

**Times seen:** 8
**Environment:** production

### Stacktrace

```
panic: runtime error: index out of range [5] with length 3

goroutine 42 [running]:

	/app/payments/processor.go:142 +0x1f4
github.com/myorg/app/api.handlePayment(0x14000123456)
	/app/api/handler.go:88 +0x9c
net/http.HandlerFunc.ServeHTTP(0x14000123456, 0x1400034f780, 0x14000305b40)
	/usr/local/go/src/net/http/server.go:2136 +0x34
```
